data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. FARMOR SENIOR is a talented type who boasts a strong winning strike-rate at this distance. Jumped well when winning his last couple. Last start won this track in a handy 24.14 beating Boonie's Bell. Speedy runner who can find the front with a clear break from out wide. Well placed and will be tough to beat. 2. FEDERAL SAKI is generally an honest type in the frame at four of nine starts but missed the placings last time when sixth (24.10) over 407m at this track. Looks suited and expected to run well. 3. FEISTY FAWNY trailed the lead and fought on well to be beaten 6 lengths into third (23.97) at this track in a Grade 4/5 over 407m. Expected to be in the finish again. 6. CAROL RAIN was in the money last start and likely to feature again.","runners":[8,2,3,6],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: ROCKHAMPTON-R11-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
